testimonials.text: The whole collaboration was smooth and easy from start to finish.
testimonials.author: Jonathan T.

testimonials.text: Working with Stanimir was a real pleasure; professional and easy to work with.
testimonials.author: Mahmood V.

testimonials.text: Stanimir delivered our software project on time with strong quality and quickly understood the requirements. Communication was efficient and professional, and we'd gladly work with him again.
testimonials.author: Alex S.

testimonials.text: Stanimir consistently delivered reliable, high-quality work with a structured and efficient approach. He was dependable, team-oriented, and performed to our full satisfaction.
testimonials.author: Eshop Guide GmbH

testimonials.text: He showed solid technical expertise and solved issues quickly in our software systems. He worked independently, handled pressure well, and was a strong team contributor.
testimonials.author: QTime GmbH

testimonials.text: Stanimir improved key C# processes while keeping existing functionality stable and reliable. His SQL and full-stack skills made him highly effective for both optimization and new development.
testimonials.author: Todor Todorov
